svg.title: Quant CoPilot — System Pipeline Diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end data and agent pipeline from raw data sources through ETL layers to agent modules and output surfaces.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Screener.in scraper work?')
sendPrompt('What data does the NSE scraper fetch?')
sendPrompt('What macro data sources are used?')
sendPrompt('How are annual report PDFs ingested for RAG?')
sendPrompt('What does balance_sheet_scrapper.py do?')
sendPrompt('What does cashflow_scrapper.py do?')
sendPrompt('What does profit_and_loss_scrapper.py do?')
sendPrompt('What does screener_downloader.py do?')
sendPrompt('What does the fundamentals extractor do?')
sendPrompt('What does the earnings extractor pull?')
sendPrompt('How is price data extracted?')
sendPrompt('What ownership data is extracted?')
sendPrompt('What macro and news signals are extracted?')
sendPrompt('What are corporate_actions and technicals extractors?')
sendPrompt('What does financials.py compute in the transform step?')
sendPrompt('What does normalizer.py do?')
sendPrompt('How does the fundamentals loader work?')
sendPrompt('How does the price loader work?')
sendPrompt('What does the screener loader do?')
sendPrompt('How are earnings reconciled in the loader?')
sendPrompt('What does reconcile.py do?')
sendPrompt('How does init_db.py set up the schema?')
sendPrompt('How does dedup.py remove duplicates?')
sendPrompt('What does validator.py check?')
sendPrompt('What does cleanup_existing_db.py fix?')
sendPrompt('How does the NLQ agent work for portfolio queries?')
sendPrompt('How does the research note generator work?')
sendPrompt('How does the portfolio command center work?')
sendPrompt('How does the factor research workbench compute factors?')
sendPrompt('What does the cited NLQ answer look like?')
sendPrompt('What is in the PDF research note output?')
sendPrompt('What risk reports does the system generate?')
sendPrompt('What does the factor decile output look like?')

svg.text: Structured Database (Screener Q3 FY24) or Annual Report 2023, pg 47
